function.name: execute_robot_tactical_sequence
function.description: Executes a tactical action sequence on the VLA robot dog. Order the steps according to the natural-language instruction context.

sequence_name.description: Short English label for this sequence, e.g. 'greet_and_play'

actions.description: Ordered queue of low-level actions to run in sequence.

action_id.description: Skill ID. Mode 1 (continuous motion, set duration to 0): 0:forward, 2:back, 3:strafe left, 4:strafe right, 5:turn left, 6:turn right. Mode 2 (blocking, use duration 2-5s): 7:sit, 8:stand up, 9:stretch, 10:roll over, 11:pose, 12:greeting. Mode 0 (emergency stop, duration 0): 1:full stop / idle.

duration.description: Duration in seconds. Mode 1 and Mode 0: always 0. Mode 2: use a plausible integer in [2, 5] from physical common sense.
